title: Choose Auto-Fit or Auto-Fill from Empty-Track Behavior
summary: Build and verify grid auto fit fill in field manual related-topic card collection through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain grid auto fit fill from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply grid auto fit fill without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

content.text: Repeat with auto-fill creates as many tracks as fit and retains empty tracks; auto-fit collapses unused tracks so occupied tracks may expand. With minmax, both support content-driven repetition without device breakpoints. The minimum must not exceed the container at narrow sizes, item count changes must be tested, and the choice depends on whether empty track alignment is useful. Apply it to field manual related-topic card collection.
